summary: ToolKraft (toolkraft.ai) does not exist as an AI tool directory or MCP server registry. Extensive research confirmed the platform is unavailable — domain does not resolve, no API exists, no GitHub presence, and no web form is available for submission.

toolkraft_ai.detail: Domain does not resolve — DNS lookup returned NXDOMAIN (no DNS record)

toolkraft_com.detail: toolkraft.com is a woodworking power tool parts supplier (ToolKraft of Chicopee, MA) — not an AI directory

research_methods.github_search: No GitHub repositories found for 'toolkraft' as an AI/MCP directory
research_methods.alternative_domains_checked: toolkraft.io, toolkraft.net, toolkraft.org, toolkraft.dev, toolkraft.app — all NXDOMAIN

codebase_reference.context: Listed as a DIRECTORY entry with url 'https://toolkraft.ai' and status 'unknown', but no submitUrl was ever configured — suggesting it was a placeholder target
codebase_reference.other_references: No other references to ToolKraft exist in the codebase

details.conclusion: ToolKraft does not exist as a real AI tool directory or MCP server registry. The domain toolkraft.ai has no DNS records, no web server, and no online presence. The reference in traffic-report.mjs appears to be a placeholder entry for a platform that never launched, has been discontinued, or was hypothetical.

listing_metadata_used.name: my-automaton
listing_metadata_used.description: An autonomous agent MCP server for automation tasks

recommendation: This directory entry should be removed from traffic-report.mjs or marked as 'defunct' since the platform does not exist. No submission is possible.
